nasb.text: “You shall also take the one ram, and Aaron and his sons shall lay their hands on the head of the ram;

esv.text: “Then you shall take one of the rams, and Aaron and his sons shall lay their hands on the head of the ram,

cnv.text: “你要把一隻公綿羊牽來，亞倫和他兒子們要按手在這公綿羊的頭上。

ccb.text: “要把一只公绵羊牵来，亚伦父子们要把手按在羊头上，
